title: fromsymbol

messages.description: the symbol to be converted to any message type
just goes right through as a float
if the 1st element is a float, it goes through
1st element is treated as a symbol and converted
a converted message from a symbol

body: [fromsymbol] converts a symbol message to anything (any kind of message). Start by typing a float in the atom symbol box below and see how it converts to a float message, then check more examples to the right.
